message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Insights by Truffle

actor "EOA" as EOA
rectangle "AuctionFactory_01" as AuctionFactory

note top of EOA: Txn Hash: 0x5bd4414fbb987abc71e4e8e9d9944cfbd2b58b33efe89e69a96f2b47c8299017

EAU -> AuctionFactory : createAuction(\n{ 0.0 GWEI })
activate AuctionFactory
group Parameters
    note right of EAU: type | name | value\n---\naddress | logic | 0x9221b7F7AFB96adBBEE4bc6D003Cc6f598ACdEA3\nuint | tokenAmount | 100000000000000000000\naddress | tokenContractAddress | 0x0bc529c00C6401aEF6D220BE8C6Ea1667F6Ad93e
end group

AuctionFactory --> EAU : REVERT! (\nstring 'Pausable: paused'\n)
deactivate AuctionFactory

note bottom: Participant details\nAlias | Contract name | Address\n---\nEOA | Externally Owned Account | 0x08e93c4BAccEBA7510d63b89E4c8496F6C8B34A4\nAuctionFactory_01 | AuctionFactory | 0xAf9798905714E8F781A06D08C5172e1Ed1620Bc0

@enduml
```
